O9.name: O9
O9.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday
 Monday - Fridays (Excluding Bank Holidays)
O9.seasonalVariationsHtml:
GWR Christmas and New Year Travel Restrictions 2025/26

Up to and including Friday 19 December: Usual ticket restrictions apply.

Monday 22 to Wednesday 24 December:

Off-Peak tickets valid all day.

Super Off-Peak tickets subject to normal restriction times.

Monday 29 December to Friday 02 January * No ticket restrictions apply.

Monday 05 January 2026 onwards Usual ticket restrictions apply.

Journey planners have been updated with the above information.

*Please note this only applies to journeys priced by GWR. Flows within Wales, between Cheltenham and Gloucester and long-distance routes to areas not served by GWR are priced by other train companies, who may have different Christmas travel restrictions in place. Usual restrictions will apply to CPAY and may apply to other Operators’ services. Please check retail systems if unsure.

Customers using Off-Peak travel cards and arriving at London Paddington before 09:30 on weekdays, will need to wait until 09:30 for onward travel from Paddington.

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Valid on Greater Anglia (TOC Code: LER) services only.

Seat reservations are compulsory.
restrictions.outwardText:
Valid on Greater Anglia (TOC Code: LER) services only.
 Seat reservations are compulsory.

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Valid on Greater Anglia (TOC Code: LER) and connecting services.

Seat reservations are compulsory.

Restrictions apply on connecting trains from Kent into London St. Pancras International and vice versa via line High Speed 1 (HS1) on Mondays to Fridays as follows:

Not valid on HS1 trains timed to arrive in London St. Pancras International before 09:59;

Not valid on HS1 trains timed to depart London St. Pancras International after 15:59 until 19:00.

Not valid on HS1 trains timed to arrive in Stratford International before 09:50;

Not valid on HS1 trains timed to depart Stratford International after 16:10 until 19:10.
restrictions.outwardText:
Valid on Greater Anglia (TOC Code: LER) and connecting services.
 Seat reservations are compulsory.
 Restrictions apply on connecting trains from Kent into London St. Pancras International and vice versa via line High Speed 1 (HS1) on Mondays to Fridays as follows:
 Not valid on HS1 trains timed to arrive in London St. Pancras International before 09:59;
 Not valid on HS1 trains timed to depart London St. Pancras International after 15:59 until 19:00.
 Not valid on HS1 trains timed to arrive in Stratford International before 09:50;
 Not valid on HS1 trains timed to depart Stratford International after 16:10 until 19:10.

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Valid on Greater Anglia (TOC Code: LER) and connecting services.

Seat reservations are compulsory.

Tickets with a Route Code of 'AP GA plus HS1' may be used on Southeastern's services via High Speed One at any time.
restrictions.outwardText:
Valid on Greater Anglia (TOC Code: LER) and connecting services.
 Seat reservations are compulsory.
 Tickets with a Route Code of 'AP GA plus HS1' may be used on Southeastern's services via High Speed One at any time.

OD.name: OD
OD.notesHtml: The ticket is only valid for use within the Network West Midlands (NWM) area. It is valid on all train companies services that operate within the NWM area for an unlimited number of journeys on the date printed on the ticket. There is no child version of this ticket.
OD.notesText: The ticket is only valid for use within the Network West Midlands (NWM) area. It is valid on all train companies services that operate within the NWM area for an unlimited number of journeys on the date printed on the ticket. There is no child version of this ticket.

restrictions.outwardHtml: nNetwork One Day tickets are valid for use all day (including the morning peak) on weekday rail, metro and bus services.

On the outward journey, you must travel on your booked train.

restrictions.returnHtml: Valid on any trains departing London on the following morning before 06:59 and after 08:01 on weekdays, and before 12:01 on any day.

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to into arrive London Terminals before 10:45.

Not valid on trains timed to pass through London Bridge after 04:29 or before 10:45, regardless of where you join or leave the service.
restrictions.outwardText:
Not valid on trains timed to into arrive London Terminals before 10:45.

restrictions.returnHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to depart any London Terminal after 04:29 and before 10:45

Not valid on trains timed to depart the following London Termini after 16:14 and before 19:16:

  • London Blackfriars
  • London Cannon Street
  • London Waterloo East
  • London Waterloo
  • London Charing Cross
  • London Victoria
  • London Bridge
  • City Thameslink

Not valid on trains timed to depart from the following London Termini after 16:29 or before 19:02

  • London Kings Cross
  • Moorgate
  • London St. Pancras International

Not valid on trains timed to pass through London St Pancras International after 16:29 or before 19:02, regardless of where you join or leave the service.

Travelcards are valid for use between these times within London Fare Zones 1-6.

PF.name: PF
PF.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday
 Excluding Bank Holidays

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Fare charged is based on the time of touch in on the gate or card validator at the origin station of the journey:

Mondays-Fridays peak fare applies between 06:30-09:30 and 16:00-19:00. Not applicable all day Saturdays, Sundays and Bank Holidays.

You must touch in and out with a contactless payment card or contactless device.

You can also use an Oyster card with pay as you go credit, but only for travel between stations in London Zones 1-9, Bayford, Broxbourne, Chafford Hundred, Cuffley, Earlswood, Epsom, Gatwick Airport, Grays, Herford East, Hertford North, Horley, Merstham Ockendon, Potters Bar, Purfleet, Radlett, Redhill, Rye House, Salfords, St Margarets, Ware, Watford Junction.

Charges capped at daily price cap limit, based on all journeys made on the same card or device between 04:30 and 04:29 the following day.

PH.name: PH
PH.applicableDaysText:
Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday
 All days

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Validity based on the time of touch in on the Oyster card validator at the origin station of the journey:

Valid for local journeys from Watford Junction to Euston [National Rail] (including between intermediate stations),

Monday - Fridays valid between 06:30-09:29. 

Not applicable all day Saturdays, Sundays and Bank Holidays.

Contactless Payment Card or Oyster card with pay as you go credit required. Not to be issued as traditional “paper” ticket.

Charges capped at daily price cap limit, based on all journeys made on the card between 04:30 and 04:29 the following day.
